title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lendingkart Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lendingkart Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lendingkart Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Lendingkart Capital India:
Lendingkart Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart Capital India!
